description_long: This is a small cluster of rustic bungalows arranged in a semi-enclosed courtyard layout, featuring three main structures with thatched and shingled roofs. The buildings are constructed primarily from dark wooden planks, with stone chimneys and some stonework visible on the central structure. The roofs are steeply pitched and covered with weathered, straw-like material, giving a traditional, rural appearance. The courtyard is partially enclosed by a simple wooden fence, with several large rocks and a string of colorful laundry hanging between the buildings. Windows are sparse and small, with wooden bars or shutters, and there are no visible porches. The overall setting suggests a modest, utilitarian residential area, possibly in a rural or village context.
description: A rustic cluster of three wooden bungalows with thatched roofs, stone chimneys, and a fenced courtyard featuring rocks and hanging laundry. The buildings have a traditional, rural appearance with small, barred windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main central bungalow with a stone chimney and two flanking bungalows with thatched roofs and visible chimneys.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced courtyard, colorful laundry line, and the arrangement of rocks and buildings around the open space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the bungalows, the stonework on the central building, and the symmetry of the rooflines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the courtyard entrance, more of the wooden fencing, and the spatial relationship between the three bungalows.
